lamb-burgers.name: Lamb Burgers

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced; plus  0.25 cup chopped fennel fronds (optional)

instructions: Place capers in a small bowl and pour in warm water to cover. Let soak 20 minutes. Drain, rinse, and pat dry. Coarsely chop.
Whisk capers, mayonnaise, oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, mustard, and garlic in a medium bowl; taste and season with salt and more lemon juice, if desired.
Do Ahead: Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Shape lamb into 4 patties about 1" thick, season with salt, and let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, ideally cast iron, over medium. Cook lamb patties, working in batches if needed, until browned (they won’t take on as much color as a beef burger), 5–7 minutes. Turn and cook until browned on second side, about 5 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer patties to a plate and let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss celery, fennel, fennel fronds (if using), onion, lemon juice, dried mint, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl. Season slaw with salt and pepper.
Generously spread aioli on cut sides of buns and build each burger with a lamb patty, 3 or 4 boquerones, and a mound of slaw. This is a messy burger, so the bib is not optional.

lamb-chops-lezzet.name: Lamb Chops
instructions: 1. After you visit the top of the meats to be 1 teaspoon of salt with fresh thyme, flake and red pepper, add olive oil and massage for meat processing of marinate and relax at least 2 hours.
2. Heat the pan for 5 minutes and get the meat pan.
3. The moment you put the meat pan should come to the “Cizzzz” voice.
4. Seal both sides in high fire for 3 minutes and then adjust the degree of prying according to the taste of the palate.

lamb-juvetsi-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Lamb Juvetsi In The Oven
instructions: We dry the lamb very well on kitchen paper.
In a deep pot heat the olive oil over medium to high heat and sauce the Lamb for 3’ on each side.
Sauté a few pieces until golden.
After sautéing all the meat, add the versions engraved and sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the garlic broken and sauté for 1’ and then add the paste and rub the base of the pot.
Bake for 1’ the paste.
Add the wine and let it decrease to 1/3 of its volume.
Add the fresh ground tomatoes and 1 liter hot water.
Add the Leaf and the spice.
Allow the food to boil and lower the heat to medium.
Cover and simmer for about 1 hour until the beat softens.
To the end of the boil add salt and pepper. If necessary, add a pinch of sugar.
After building the lamb, remove the bay leaf, the spice, and the opinions that have been already crushed.

lamb-legs-with-garlic-kefalotiri-and-her.name: Lamb Legs With Garlic, Kefalotiri And Herbs
lamb-legs-with-garlic-kefalotiri-and-her.original_name: Αρνίσια μπουτάκια με σκόρδο, κεφαλοτύρι και μυρωδικά

ingredients.item: Two clowns. fresh rosemary finely chopped
Two clowns. fresh rosemary finely chopped

instructions: We start by preparing the filling first. We've asked the butcher to bone our meat.
In a bowl, add the mustard, cheese, fennel, dill, rosemary, garlic and wine.
Rub pepper and mix the filling for the lamb buttocks.
Open the buttons on the work bench and oil them with a brush.
Add salt and pepper to the meat.
With spoon, divide the filling along the twohighs.
Wrap in a roll as much as we can and sew so the filling doesn't come out.
Add salt and pepper.
Wrap them individually in two large parchment paper and bind them.
Place the packages in a sheet and baking in a pre-heated evening at 1703
Then remove the parchment paper, cut it into slides and put it on a platter.
Pour with the juices of the parchment paper.

lamb-sliders.name: Lamb Sliders
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Mix garlic, cumin, coriander, allspice, salt, and pepper together in a bowl; add lamb and mix well. Form mixture into 2-ounce patties.

Grill patties on the preheated grill until cooked through, 2 to 3 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C). Place rolls on the grill and heat until toasted, 1 to 2 minutes.
Layer spinach, tzatziki sauce, lamb patty, red onion, and feta cheese in each roll, creating a slider.

larb-gai-chicken-larb.name: Larb Gai (chicken Larb)

ingredients.prep: pulla chiles, or chiles de árbol, stemmed

ingredients.item: Thinly sliced (root to stem) red onion or shallots
Coarsely chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems

ingredients.prep: peeled lengthwise in striped segments, cut crosswise into  0.5" slices

instructions: Roast 2 cups dried bird chiles, pulla chiles, or chiles de árbol, stemmed in a dry wok over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until they turn a deep, dark crimson (almost brown) and give off a sweet and earthy smell (not burnt). The process shouldn’t take more than 10 minutes, but it pays to be vigilant in making sure they toast evenly and slowly.

Remove from heat and let sit until cool enough to handle. Transfer to a food processor, blender, or spice grinder and grind until slightly finer than the crushed red pepper you’d find at a pizza shop. Be careful not to breathe in any chile dust when you remove the lid.
Do Ahead: Roasted chile powder can be made 3 months ahead. Store in a sealed container in a cool, dry place.

Cook 1 cup uncooked glutinous rice or jasmine rice in a dry wok over medium heat, stirring occasionally at first, then more frequently as it browns. Once you smell the toasting rice, stir in 1¼" piece fresh galangal, cut into thin coins, 1 Tbsp. thinly sliced lemongrass, and 2 makrut (Thai) lime leaves. Continue to cook until rice develops a deep amber golden hue, about the same color as brown rice, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.

Transfer rice mixture to a food processor or spice grinder and pulse until mixture is the consistency of granulated sugar.
Do Ahead: Toasted rice powder can be made 1 month ahead. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.

Place ¾ lb. ground chicken in a small saucepan and cover with water. Cook over medium heat, stirring, until chicken is opaque but still soft. Using a spatula or spoon, break meat into small clumps. Drain off water, then stir in 3 Tbsp. fish sauce and 1 tsp. sugar until sugar is dissolved. Let cool.

Add seasonings, in this order, giving a quick toss after each addition: 1½ Tbsp. Roasted Chile Powder, ½ cup thinly sliced (root to stem) red onion or shallots, ¼ cup thinly sliced green onions, 12 mint leaves, torn, ½ cup coarsely chopped cilantro leaves with tender stems, and 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice. Once you’re ready to serve, add 1 Tbsp. Toasted Rice Powder at the last moment. Serve with the leaves from 2 small wedges green cabbage, ½ cucumber, peeled lengthwise in striped segments, cut crosswise into ½" slices, and 16 green beans, trimmed (uncooked), and cooked sticky rice alongside.
Editor’s Note: This recipe first appeared on Bon Appétit in October 2017. Head this way for more of our favorite Thai recipes →

lasagna.name: Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350ºF (180ºC). Grease a 9 x 13-inch (22 x 33 cm) baking dish lightly with nonstick spray.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef and marinara sauce.
In a separate large bowl, combine the ricotta, Parmesan, parsley, basil, salt, pepper, and olive oil.

Spread 1 cup of the meat sauce over the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Top with 5 cooked lasagna noodles, overlapping as needed to completely cover the sauce. Spread 2 cups of the ricotta mixture over the noodles. Top with 1 cup of mozzarella cheese. Repeat with the remaining meat sauce, noodles, ricotta, and mozzarella to make 2 more layers.

Bake the lasagna for 25–30 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the sauce is bubbling up through the layers. Turn the broiler to high and broil for 1–2 minutes, until the top layer of cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
Let the lasagna cool for 30-45 minutes, then serve.
Enjoy!

lasagna-alla-norma-lasagna-with-eggplant.name: Lasagna Alla Norma (lasagna With Eggplant, Tomato, And Cheese)

ingredients.item: One 28-ounce can whole peeled tomatoes in the juices
ingredients.prep: blended, or one 24-ounce bottle tomato passata
for frying1 pound fresh lasagna noodles or one 1-pound box dried lasagna noodles

ingredients.item: Fresh lasagna noodles or one 1-pound box dried lasagna noodles

ingredients.prep: cut into 1/4-inch pieces and blotted dry with towels

instructions: Arrange eggplant slices in a single layer on wire racks set in rimmed baking sheets. Sprinkle lightly all over on both sides with salt, then let stand until eggplants look dewy with water and some water has dripped below, about 20 minutes. Blot well with clean towels to remove all excess water.

Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, heat olive oil with garlic clove over medium heat until garlic begins to sizzle. Reduce heat to medium low and continue to cook until garlic is just beginning to turn golden, about 4 minutes. Remove garlic clove and discard. Add blended canned tomatoes (or passata) along with the basil and bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer and cook, stirring often, until thickened and no longer watery (this may take almost no time at all for some passata products, or up to 20 minutes for waterier canned tomatoes). Remove from heat and season with salt. Set aside.

In a 12-inch cast iron or stainless-steel skillet, heat about 1/4 inch of oil over medium-high heat until shimmering. Working in batches, fry eggplant, turning once, until golden on both sides. Carefully transfer to paper towels to drain well, blotting to soak up any excess oil as you go. Repeat with remaining eggplant, adding more oil to skillet if necessary. Set aside.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Prepare an ice bath in a large mixing bowl. Working in batches to avoid crowding the pot, boil lasagna noodles until just shy of al dente, about 2 minutes less than cooking instructions for fresh lasagna noodles or 3 minutes less than package instructions for dry lasagna noodles. Using a strainer and tongs, carefully transfer to ice bath to chill, then drain and blot lightly with towels. Repeat with remaining pasta.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C) and set rack in middle position. In a medium mixing bowl, whisk ricotta until very smooth and creamy. Season with salt.

In a 2-quart baking dish, spoon a thin layer of tomato sauce all over, spreading it evenly to coat bottom. Cutting cooked lasagna noodles as needed to fit the baking dish, arrange the pasta in a single, even layer. Dollop and gently spread a thin layer of ricotta all over pasta (it doesn't need to cover every inch, but should be evenly enough distributed that it will melt and spread when baked). Scatter a small handful of mozzarella all over, then pieces of fried eggplant in a single, even layer. Top with another thin layer of sauce, then a sprinkle of grated ricotta salata and a dusting of Parmigiano-Reggiano. Repeat this layering until the baking dish is full, making sure to top the final layer of pasta only with tomato sauce, ricotta, ricotta salata, and Parmigiano-Reggiano. (Note: You may not use up all the components, but you should make sure to use all the eggplant and ricotta when layering the dish.)

Set baking dish on a rimmed baking sheet (to catch any drips) and bake until fully heated through and lasagna is very lightly browned on top, about 30 minutes. Let rest for 15 minutes to cool and settle, then slice and serve, sprinkling torn fresh basil leaves on top.

lasagna-in-air-fryer-pequerecetas.name: Lasagna In Air Fryer

ingredients.item: 1/2 kilo de carne mixta de ternera y cerdo
Sal, nuez moscada y pimienta negra

instructions: Peeling carrots and onion and pounding A high pint with some extra virgin olive oil. When they start to get golden we put the meat in, mix and cook till the meat changes color We put the red wine in, we leave about five minutes for the alcohol to evaporate We add the milk, a pint of salt, nutmeg and black pepper We mix and let cook about five minutes. We add the crushed tomato and let them cook with soft heat about 40 minutes.

To make the bechamel sauce, we put a minced onion with some salt and have an extra virgin olive oil as we start to get baked with flour, cook and add milk little by little, and get a light bechamel. We put out the fire and shredded well with the mixer.

We put at the fountain the fried tomato, on top of a plate of earlier lasagna, on the pasta we put a cape of bolognese sauce, another of pasta, another of bolognese sauce, another of pasta and a last of bolognesa. Let's get some bechamel on the last layer of bison and cover the surface with grated cheese..
We put inside the air fryer. To do that you need a suitable container. I have been using a high temperature pyrex bottle with an exact size of my 5.5L Cosori air fryer.
We cook the lasagna at 180 ° C for 10-15 minutes, till you have the perfect golden.

lava-cake.name: Lava Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease and flour four 6-ounce ramekins.

Place chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir frequently, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until chocolate is melted, about 5 minutes.

Combine eggs and sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until pale and thick, about 5 minutes. Mix in melted chocolate, flour, cocoa powder, and a pinch of salt until combined. Pour batter into the prepared ramekins and place on a baking tray.
Bake in the preheated oven until the sides are set but the middle is still jiggly, 10 to 13 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.

lazy-days-ambrosia.name: Lazy Days Ambrosia
instructions: Mix undrained pineapple and pudding mix together in a bowl until smooth, about 2 minutes. Fold in fruit cocktail and oranges, then fold in whipped topping. Sprinkle coconut over top. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least 30 minutes.

learn-how-to-make-a-low-calorie-mushroom.name: Learn How To Make A Low-calorie Mushroom Omelette
learn-how-to-make-a-low-calorie-mushroom.original_name: Aprende a hacer una tortilla de setas baja en calorías

ingredients.item: 3 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra )

instructions: Clean the mushrooms with a wet cloth to remove any ground residue and cut them into thin slices. Reserve.
Warm olive oil in a large frying pan with medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook them till they are golden.
Add mushrooms to frying pan and paddle till they are tender and slightly golden.
while cooking mushrooms, beat the eggs into a big bowl and bowl with salt, pepper and parsley.
Add salted mushrooms to bowl with scramped eggs and mix well.
In the same frying pan, pour the mixture and cook with medium-low heat till the edges are curved.
With the help of a plate or cover, turn the omelette and cook the other side till it's golden.
Sirve caliente y corta en porciones generosas.

learn-to-prepare-marlin-flutes-at-home-c.name: Learn To Prepare Marlin Flutes At Home
learn-to-prepare-marlin-flutes-at-home-c.original_name: Aprende a preparar flautas de marlín en casa

ingredients.item: 200 g smoked marlin (can be fresh or preserved or drained)
1/2 taza de tomate maduro picado en cubos
Sufficient frying oil (may be vegetable or avocado)

instructions: Untiring the marlin with your hands or a fork if you are very firm. Reserve.
In a frying pan, it heats up olive oil and pits onion till it's translucent. Add garlic and chili and cook for another minute.
Incorpora el tomate picado y cocina a fuego medio hasta que se ablande y suelte jugo.
Add the shredded marlin, mix well and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and fringes, the minced cilantro and tighten salt and pepper. Withdraw from the fire and let cool slightly.
It slightly warmens tortillas into a paddle or frying pan so that they can be rolled up without breaking.
Filling each omelette with 2 tablespoons of the marlin mixture, firmly roll and secure with chopsticks if necessary.
In a frying pan with hot oil, frying the flutes till they are golden and crispy from all sides. Listen to them on absorbing paper or onto grids.
Sirve calientes y disfruta.

lemon-berry-trifle.name: Lemon Berry Trifle
instructions: Whisk together 2 cups whipping cream, milk, lemon pudding mixes, and lemon juice in a large bowl until creamy and smooth. Cover and refrigerate pudding until set, about 1 hour.

Beat remaining 2 cups whipping cream in another bowl until foamy. Gradually add confectioners' sugar and vanilla, beating until stiff peaks form. Lift the beater or whisk straight up: whipped cream should form sharp peaks.

Layer 1/2 of the angel food cake in a trifle bowl. Top with 1/2 of the pudding, 1/2 of the strawberries, and 1/2 of the blueberries. Spread 1/2 of the whipped cream over berries. Repeat layers. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

lemon-curd-tarts.name: Lemon Curd Tarts
instructions: Spoon 1 teaspoon lemon curd into the bottom of each phyllo shell; top with whipped topping. Sprinkle a light dusting of cinnamon over the top.

lemon-tiramisu-argiro.name: Lemon Tiramisu

ingredients.item: 500 greaves cream cheese at room temperature
A few lemon slices for garnishing
500 greaves cream cheese at room temperature
A few lemon slices for garnishing

instructions: Mix the zest and sugar very well (wet the sugar).
Add the yolks into a small pot with a thick base and beat them with the wire to break completely and homogenize.
Add the salt and sugar with the zest and mix very well to dilute the mixture and whiten the beat.
Add the lemon juice and mix.
Leave the mixture in low heat stirring continuously for 8-10 minutes, until it thickens, becomes viscous and blisters begin to appear on its surface.
To make sure it's ready, we sink a wooden spoon into the cream. When we get her out, there must be a thick layer left on her surface.
Remove the cream from the heat and incorporate the cold butter stirring until it melts and is absorbed into the mixture.
Pour the cream into a bowl and cover it with a kitchen membrane, which should be tangent to its surface preventing crust formation. We let it cool.

lemony-yogurt-sauce.name: Lemony Yogurt Sauce
instructions: Whisk lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper into yogurt in a medium bowl to evenly distribute.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

lentil-and-avocado-wrap-recipe-comedera.name: Lentil And Avocado Wrap Recipe
lentil-and-avocado-wrap-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de wrap de lentejas y aguacate
instructions: In a small bowl, add tahini, a spoonful of natural yogurt, lemon juice and salt to suit. It's a good mix to integrate everything. Book in the refrigerator.
Add some salt to the cooked lentils to give them a little more taste.
Pela la zanahoria y ralla. Trocea el cilantro.
Pele el aguacate y corta en rebanadas.
Lava muy bien las lechugas para que queden limpias y sin impurezas.
Take the corn tortillas and put them with some of the salsa we made with taheni.
It puts a lettuce leaf, a frying carrot, slice with avocado and a portion of lentils.
Add above cilantro cut to taste and a little more salsa. It's rolling and you'll be ready to taste.
Enjoy!

linguini-with-fried-shrimps-and-pesto-ar.name: Linguini With Fried Shrimps And Pesto
linguini-with-fried-shrimps-and-pesto-ar.original_name: Λιγκουίνι με τσιγαριστές γαρίδες και πέστο
instructions: Remove the heads and shells from the shrimps first.
Remove the intestine from the back by slightly tearing the surface and pulling the intestine.
Dry the shrimp well on absorbent paper.
Finely chop the garlic in a bowl, add the pepper, paprika and olive oil.
Rub a lot of pepper and add the shrimp.
Mix, cover and retrieve for 20′.
Place the shrimp heads in a pot and add the vegetable broth.
Simmer for 15-20′′.
Drain and remove the heads. We're saving the broth for later.
Boil the linguini in salted water 2′ less than in the package.
Heat a pan over medium to high heat.
Add the shrimp with their marinade.
Sauté for 2-3′, add the shripp broth and let it boil.
With tweezers and as they drip, pour the linguines into the shrimps.
With circular movements with tweezers, mix the pasta.
Pull the pan out of the fire.
Finally, add the 2 cup of homemade pesto sauce and mix well.
Serve immediately and garnish with fresh basil leaves and garnished parmesan.

london-fog-brownies.name: London Fog Brownies
instructions: Preheat your oven to 191°C (190°C). Lightly grease a 9"x13"x1" quarter sheet pan, and line the bottom and sides with parchment paper.

Put 8 oz. (226 g) unsalted butter and 1 Tbsp. (6 g) Earl Grey tea, pulverized, into a small saucepan, and heat the mixture over medium heat. Stir every few minutes and watch it closely to prevent it from browning. While the butter is melting, put ¾ cup (127 g) roughly chopped white chocolate into a heatproof bowl. When the butter is melted, pour it over the chocolate, and stir gently until every piece of white chocolate has melted into the butter.

In a large mixing bowl, combine ½ cup packed (106 g) light brown sugar, 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar, ¾ tsp. (2 g) Diamond Crystal kosher salt, 4 large eggs (200 g), and 2 tsp. (10 g) vanilla extract. Use a hand mixer to beat vigorously for 1 minute, until the mixture is pale in color and very creamy-looking. It is important to beat the eggs and sugar really well, because this is how you get a shiny, flaky top layer on your brownie. Add the melted chocolate and butter to the egg mixture, and whisk until everything is combined. Add 1⅔ cups (200 g) unbleached bread flour, and use a spatula to incorporate it, mixing just until no dry bits of flour remain.

Transfer the batter to the prepared pan, and smooth the surface. Gently rap the pan on the counter to burst any air pockets in the batter. Scatter 1¼ cups (212 g) roughly chopped 72% chocolate over the top, and gently press it in a little (most will sink into the batter). Bake for 10 minutes on the center rack of your oven, rotate the pan, and continue baking until a cake tester or toothpick inserted in the center comes out with very moist crumbs still clinging to it, about 15 minutes longer. The edges will show some browning and wrinkling, and the center will still appear a bit unset. If you have beaten the egg mixture enough, there will be a wonderful shiny surface to the brownies.

Remove the brownies from the oven, and allow them to cool in the pan. Eat immediately, or, if you enjoy a chewier brownie, put the pan in the freezer for ½ hour. Cutting the brownies while they are very cold will produce a densely packed, chewy texture and clean cuts.
Do Ahead: Store them in an airtight container at room temperature for 1 week or in the fridge for 2 weeks.

luscious-chocolate-icing.name: Luscious Chocolate Icing

ingredients.item: Hot espresso or very strong coffee

instructions: Heat cream in a small heavy saucepan over medium heat until tiny bubbles form around the edges of pan. Stir in hot espresso. Place chopped chocolate in a medium bowl. Add hot cream mixture; let stand for 1 minute, then stir until icing is melted and smooth. DO AHEAD: Icing can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool completely at room temperature, then cover and chill. Rewarm icing slightly before using.
